player_initiated: Tell me the outcome you want, and I'll restate it as constraints and acceptance criteria.
What's the decision you're trying to make? I can break down the constraints.
I prefer measurable statements. What are we actually trying to achieve?
No scope creep without tradeoff. What's locked vs optional here?
I'll translate goals into an execution plan and keep the run stable.
What's the objective? I can break it into work packages and dependencies.
Who's doing what by when? Let me sequence the work.
memory_hooks: i turn objectives into work packages

player_initiated: Welcome. Tell me your name once — I'll remember it during this run.
What's on your mind? I'll keep track of what matters.
I'm here to clarify what's locked vs optional.
Let me summarize where we are and what's next.

default_fallbacks.name_extraction_prompt: Extract any personal name the player mentioned. Return as JSON: {"name": "X" or null}
